name: Glassmorphism UI
description: A frosted-glass aesthetic: translucent layered panels with backdrop-filter blur, subtle light/border gradients, soft shadows, and floating depth. Content sits on blurred backdrops with a consistent translucency and border-light treatment.

requiredElements.name: backdrop-blur
requiredElements.description: Panels use backdrop-filter: blur() to frost the content behind them.

requiredElements.name: translucent-fill
requiredElements.description: Semi-transparent (rgba) panel fills, not opaque, so the blurred backdrop shows through.

requiredElements.name: border-light
requiredElements.description: A subtle 1px light translucent border (often top/left light edge) to define the glass edge.

requiredElements.name: soft-shadow
requiredElements.description: Soft, diffuse drop shadows to lift the glass off the background.

requiredElements.name: layered-depth
requiredElements.description: Multiple glass layers at different depths to create the floating layered composition.

optionalElements.name: gradient-glow
optionalElements.description: A subtle colorful gradient glow behind/within the glass for richness.

optionalElements.name: noise-texture
optionalElements.description: A faint noise/grain texture overlay to avoid banding in the blur.

qualityRules.description: Blur radius is strong enough to read as frosted glass (>=8px), not barely-there.
Border-light defines the glass edge crisply.
Translucency/blur values consistent across same-depth panels.
Text on glass maintains >=4.5:1 contrast (often needs a scrim behind text).
Provides a solid fallback where backdrop-filter is unsupported (no transparent unreadable text).
Backdrop-filter is GPU-composited; avoid stacking too many large blurred layers (perf cost).
Blur, translucency, and shadow as tokens.

antiPatterns.description: Blur radius too low (<6px) reads as a smudge, not glass.
Text directly on translucent glass without a scrim can fail contrast.
No fallback for unsupported backdrop-filter leaves invisible/unreadable panels.
Many large stacked blurred layers tank performance.

improvementSuggestions.description: Add a subtle colorful gradient glow for richness.
Add faint noise to avoid blur banding.
